text: I find myself moving between two environments that evoke contemplation and curiosity. The open, quiet room—almost sterile in its emptiness—suggests a pause, an invitation to reflection or waiting. It feels both peaceful and slightly isolating. In contrast, the vibrant R+D exhibit bursts with color and ideas, stimulating my mind with questions about the relationship between humans and technology. Here, I feel a spark of excitement and wonder, eager to explore how knowledge and innovation intersect. Both spaces are thought-provoking, yet in very different ways: one meditative, the other invigorating.
